message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

participant "Computer" as Computer
participant "User" as User

Computer -> User: 1 Asks for amount of numbers
User -->> Computer: 2 tells computer how many numbers
Computer -> User: 3 Asks User for numbers
User -->> Computer: 4 Enters all the numbers
Computer -> User: 5 Prints out the sum of the numbers

@enduml
```
